ogTitle: Caltowie West vs Camden Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Caltowie West and Camden Park.
heading: Caltowie West vs Camden Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Caltowie West, South Australia and Camden Park, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Caltowie West has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Camden Park (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Caltowie West or Camden Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Caltowie West has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Camden Park scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Caltowie West scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Camden Park scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Caltowie West or Camden Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Caltowie West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
